sourceProvenance.excerpt: TPCAV: Interpreting deep learning genomics models via concept attribution

Interpreting genomics deep learning models remains challenging. Existing feature attribution methods are largely restricted to one-hot DNA inputs and therefore cannot assess the influence of more general genomic features such as chromatin states or genomic repeats. Concept attribution methods offer an input-agnostic global interpretation framework, yet they have not been systematically applied to interpret neural network applications in genomics. We present the first application of concept attri
